selfcheck.chosen_text: Cuando el problema es determinista y auditabilidad importa
selfcheck.justification_from_packet: [B1/Skeptic] Skeptic: «regla vs modelo vs LLM» — if deterministic and patterns known → rules; rules are cheap and auditable. Prefer rules when determinism + auditability matter.
[B1/Skeptic] Skeptic: prompting/schema — validate with json.loads + required keys; invalid structured output is discarded / human review, not published as success.

selfcheck.chosen_text: Tratando el texto como untrusted y filtrando/ no elevando a system
selfcheck.justification_from_packet: [B1/Skeptic] Skeptic: «prompt injection…» — treat document text as untrusted; separate system vs user; strip overrides; do not elevate doc instructions to system.

selfcheck.chosen_text: Nunca de forma autónoma en este curso; solo evidencia para humano
selfcheck.justification_from_packet: [B1/Skeptic] Skeptic: selection tree + security — classifying fraud with autonomous LLM is prohibited; only signals for human. Never autonomous fraud labels in this course.
